# Product Glossary

Use this file when a project has accepted domain language. Keep it focused on
product concepts, user-facing terms, business rules, and domain names.

Do not use this file for harness process terms. Those belong in
`docs/GLOSSARY.md`.

## Terms

| Term | Meaning | Source |
| --- | --- | --- |

Add rows only after real project terms are accepted.

## Rules

- Add a term when it affects product docs, architecture names, public APIs,
  validation assertions, or story language.
- Link the product doc, story, decision, or intake snapshot that introduced the
  term.
- Keep implementation details out unless the implementation name is itself a
  durable product contract.
